Name: Umbral Knight
Skill: Unleashes a flurry of sword attacks. Attack direction can be changed during the advance by moving right or left.
Lore: : The Umbral Knight is an Ancient who made a Deathless Pact with the first White Priestess of Land’s End, the Priestess of the Dawn, in the final moments of their civilization. They were unable to properly protect her as their spirit had begun to deteriorate; it took until the fall of the kingdom for them to regain their strength and awaken. They showed themselves to Lily, one of the only two surviving descendants of the Priestess of the Dawn.

Name: Gerrod, The Elder Warrior
Skill: Swings a heavy, powerful hammer slowly, but with force and range enough to blow enemies away.
Lore: One of the knights devoted to protecting the people of Land’s End, Gerrod became famed for his massive stature, indomitable strength, and unfailing altruism. He was dubbed the finest knight in all the kingdom, and was considered both a hero and a symbol of glory to his home village. Eventually, Gerrod drank the Deathless Elixir and became an Immortal Knight to better defend the kingdom from the Blighted. Returning from a fierce battle, Gerrod was dismayed to see that the people of the village were afraid of what he had become as a result of his decision. At one point, Fretia and a young White Priestess visited Gerrod to comfort him. Even as he became Blighted, Gerrod refused to be purified by the White Priestess, knowing well the immense pain it would put them through. Devoting his final moments to protecting his people, Gerrod eventually lost his sanity to the Blight and descended into madness.

Name: Dark Witch Eleine
Skill: Fires ranged arcane projectiles. Projectiles will home slightly on enemies in front of you.
Lore: : Eleine was a gifted sorceress from a young age, whose perpetual loneliness was eased by her becoming Fretia’s friend. At some point, Fretia is implied to have purified Eleine's mother after she was afflicted with the Blight. Due to her immense talent, Eleine was raised within the Coven and later on became its leader. After the defense of the Twin Spires, Eleine frequently visited Fretia in her quarantine. During one of these visits, Fretia entrusted her with a cherished heirloom necklace from her mother; its magic stone had shattered when Fretia purified the Blighted Lord. At Fretia's request, Eleine fashioned shards of this stone into protective pendants to help sustain the White Priestess.[1] Despite her tireless research into the Abyss to free Fretia from her burden, she eventually succumbed to the Blight and died in the depths of Witch’s Thicket.

Name: Guardian Silva
Skill: Chains attack with a hammer. Charged attacks cause more damage and cover a wider area.
Lore: Silva is Siegrid's sister and the two of them became Guardians before Fretia, the Priestess of the Fount, was born. When Fretia was of a young age, Silva was assigned as her Guardian. After the defense of the Twin Spires, Silva accompanied Fretia to the Verboten Domain. As the experiments on Fretia harshened and Fretia became Blighted, Silva also became Blighted and began to move back to her sister in the Cathedral. Silva presumably did not make it all the way back and was instead left in the Catacombs.

Name: Ulv, The Mad Knight
Skill: Slashes twice with giant claws. Charging unleashes gouging attacks and a devastating finisher, but leaves you wide open.
Lore: One of the knights of Land’s End who eventually became one of the Immortal Knights, Ulv quickly gained an intimidating reputation for himself due to his berserk fighting style, short temper, and difficulty expressing himself with words. Because of this, he was dubbed the Mad Knight by his own men and feared by the rest of the knights, to the point where meeting with him required written approval by Knight Captain Julius Ulv did not seem to mind being shunned by his peers, but secretly lamented that as an Immortal Knight, he would never fulfill his dream of dying in battle. During the defense of the Bastion, Fretia met and befriended Ulv despite his reputation and difficulty communicating, going so far as to try and make a painting for him. This in turn caused Ulv to become fiercely devoted to her, as she taught him that there was more to life than just battle. Although Fretia later had to leave, when the small White Priestesses were created and scattered around Land's End, Ulv ended up befriending the one who took up residence in the Twin Spires. By the time Lily gets to him, Ulv had succumbed to the Blight, having spent much of his time tending to the Snowflower Garden atop the Twin Spires in hopes that Fretia would eventually return to watch them bloom again. Even in his maddened, Blighted state, Ulv remembered Fretia's love for the flowers and continued protecting them with his life.

Name: Knight Captain Julius
Skill: Unleashes a series of jabbing attacks with a lance that allows for maximum reach. Advancing thrust can be made by using this skill while moving sideways.
Lore: Julius was the illegitimate son of the King of Land’s End. Julius' mother passed away at his birth and when he was still a baby, he was taken then raised by his uncle the Dark Executioner Hoenir. During his youth, Julius trained in fierce competition with a nameless peer. After enduring a hard life, Julius left the Execution Grounds and became a knight to get back at the father who abandoned him. With his unparalleled tenacity, Julius rose up the ranks and became the youngest Knight Captain, and one of the strongest warriors in the Kingdom of End. As a Knight of the Bastion defending the Kingdom against the Blighted, Julius led his knights to take the Deathless Elixir, making their bodies immortal. With his Immortal Knight, Julius fought off the Crimson Blight’s horde at the Twin Spires, paving the way for the White Priestess of the Fount, Fretia to face and purify the Ancient Blighted Lord. After the victory, Julius wished to be recognized by the King, as his beloved son and heir who was lost. When the Rain of Death fell, mutated the people into deathless abominations, and triggered the terrible transformations of those who drank the Deathless Elixir, the Knight Captain went to the castle and sought the King's aid only to be disappointed, for he had witnessed the truth: that the King was obsessed with the pursuit of immortality and sacrificed many of Julius' comrades and the subjects they were supposed to save for that pursuit. As his mind began to fade, the Knight Captain found himself in the throne room standing over the King. The Blight had allowed Julius' hate to take over, leading to him killing the king with his own hands. There in the throne room, Julius remained in his Blighted state, waiting to be put out of his misery.

Name: Hoenir
Skill: Launches a blitz of dark blades to shred the enemy to pieces from a distance.
Lore: Leader of the Dark Executioners, raised Julius, succumbed to the Blight but honored Fretia's request.

Name: Faden, The Heretic
Skill: Manipulates Blighted to blast enemies. While slow, this deals heavy damage.
Lore: Researcher of the Blight, created Deathless Elixir, horrified Silva by cloning Fretia.

Name: Guardian Siegrid
Skill: Swings an iron ball to attack surrounding enemies.
Lore: Siegrid tasked herself with watching over Lily and the other youths in the church, resolved to help Fretia despite regrets.

Name: Cliffside Hamlet Youth
Skill: Performs an arced leap and lands with enough force to scatter and damage surrounding enemies.
Lore: Separated from his mother in a storm, the boy set off for the White Parish but never arrived.

Name: Headless Defender
Skill: A knight with shield at the ready. Well-timed blocks will counter enemies, leaving them stunned.
Lore: Knight who followed Gerrod, became immortal, was beheaded after attacking fellow knights.

Name: Western Merchant
Skill: Summons the spirit of the Western Merchant, who launches ranged attacks at enemies on sight.
Lore: Merchant from western lands, vibrant salesman who peddled rare stock in Land's End.

Name: Castle Town Maiden
Skill: Summons the spirit of the Castle Town Maiden, who strikes enemies she finds on the ground with melee attacks.
Lore: The maiden was tending to her dog when the Rain came. The dog never left her side.

Name: Fallen Archer
Skill: Releases a fan-shaped volley of arrows skyward to attack airborne enemies.
Lore: The kingdom's greatest archer became a Sinner to save his Guardian sister.

Name: Elder Crypt Keeper
Skill: Fires arcane projectiles that damage and trap enemies for a short time.
Lore: After a lifetime spent guarding the catacombs, the elder crypt keeper wished to be interred under his son's watch.

Name: Fungal Sorcerer
Skill: Generates a toxic mist that reduces enemy health over time. Damage cannot be blocked.
Lore: Learned much on travels beyond Land's End, but never reached the Coven where his lover awaited.

Name: Fungal Sorceress
Skill: Harnesses the wind to blow away enemies before you.
Lore: Charming sorceress, gravely ill, waited amongst flowers for her lover's return.

Name: Fallen Sentinel
Skill: Flies forward, piercing enemies in their path with their blade.
Lore: Soldiers of the Twin Spires mutated into winged abominations after drinking suspicious elixirs.

Name: Hidden Test Subject
Skill: Uses the urn holding the test subject's body as a shield. Well-timed blocks unleash a counterattack.
Lore: A heroic bandit branded a Sinner, taken to the Verboten Domain as a test subject.

Name: Dark Executioner
Skill: Phases behind an enemy in visible range and brings down their blade.
Lore: Nameless Dark Executioner trained alongside Julius, but his Sinner blood kept him from becoming a knight.

Name: Incompetent Sinner
Skill: Grabs hold of you and darts forward, propelling both some distance.
Lore: A curious man who ventured into the Verboten Domain, later found Blighted but non-violent.

Name: Verboten Champion
Skill: Leap upward shredding airborne enemies with razor-sharp claws.
Lore: Former knight who clung to humanity, escaped the Stockade, entered Faden's lab.

Name: Cliffside Hamlet Elder
Skill: Bloated body arcs up and lands with force to level surrounding area.
Lore: The Rain rotted and fused the Elder with his cattle into a monstrous anomaly.

Name: Chief Guardian
Skill: Hurls a chain fitted with a circular blade.
Lore: Once protector of the prior priestess, suffered in the Rain and wept at the pain of sacrifice.

Name: One Eyed Royal Aegis
Skill: Thrusts greatsword into the ground, creating a shockwave that launches enemies.
Lore: Royal Aegis elite tasked with protecting the King, betrayed by a peer, consumed by madness.

Name: Forsaken Fellwyrm
Skill: Exhales a breath of toxic mist that spreads over a wide area.
Lore: Children denied life in the castle were given refuge in the Twin Spires and trained as knights.
